title: Bouncy Blocks
body:
Adding blocks for all your bouncy needs!
Currently added - 
Bouncy blocks
Even bouncier blocks (Gain velocity!)
Landing blocks (Negate all fall damage!)
Launch blocks (Shoot you high into the air!)

Working on adding variants to all these blocks!

Crafting recipes:
Bouncy blocks:
Color wool of your choice + slime ball

Bouncier blocks:
Bouncy block + slime ball

Landing blocks:
White wool + Honey glass (Working on adding all wool colors)

Launch blocks:
White wool + glowstone (Working on adding all wool colors)
